  as={"h2"}

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"x-ee-timeout","in":"header","schema":{"type":"integer","description":"Request timeout in milliseconds (overrides EENGINE_TIMEOUT environment variable)","minimum":0,"maximum":7200000},"description":"Request timeout in milliseconds (overrides EENGINE_TIMEOUT environment variable)"},{"name":"deliveryTest","in":"path","schema":{"type":"string","description":"Test ID","example":"6420a6ad-7f82-4e4f-8112-82a9dad1f34d","x-format":{"guid":{"version":["uuidv4","uuidv5"]}}},"description":"Test ID","required":true}]}

  id={undefined}

  responses={{"200":{"description":"Successful","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"success":{"type":"boolean","description":"Was the test completed","example":true},"dkim":{"type":"object","description":"DKIM results","title":"dkim"},"spf":{"type":"object","description":"SPF results","title":"spf"},"dmarc":{"type":"object","description":"DMARC results","title":"dmarc"},"bimi":{"type":"object","description":"BIMI results","title":"bimi"},"arc":{"type":"object","description":"ARC results","title":"arc"},"mainSig":{"type":"object","description":"Primary DKIM signature. `status.aligned` should be set, otherwise DKIM check should not be considered as passed.","title":"mainSig"}},"title":"DeliveryCheckResponse"}}}}}}
>
